use tokio::sync::mpsc;

async fn process_events() {
    let (tx, mut rx) = mpsc::channel(256);

    tokio::spawn(async move {
        for i in 0..100000 {
            if tx.send(i).await.is_err() {
                break;
            }
        }
    });

    while let Some(msg) = rx.recv().await {
        handle_message(msg);
    }
}

fn handle_message(_msg: u64) {}

async fn produce_items(tx: &mpsc::Sender<String>, items: &[String]) {
    for item in items {
        if tx.send(item.clone()).await.is_err() {
            break;
        }
    }
}

async fn broadcast(tx: &mpsc::Sender<Event>, count: usize) {
    for i in 0..count {
        if tx.send(Event { id: i }).await.is_err() {
            break;
        }
    }
}

struct Event { id: usize }
